Comparison value: this is the cleanest locator result in the portfolio (3/3 with zero label demotions), achieved on the messiest source so far, under the thinking-enabled configuration, with entry caps respected, completing a line-range-first repeat across a third source, a second lab-config pairing, and both thinking modes. raw source text and raw model output are not committed. This review is not validation, product evidence, strategy evidence, financial advice, live-trading authority, graduation, or architecture.
